name: insta
description: Snapshot testing library for Rust by Armin Ronacher with a companion CLI (cargo-insta) for reviewing and updating snapshots.

seo.title: insta — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: insta: Snapshot testing library for Rust by Armin Ronacher with a companion CLI (cargo-insta) for reviewing and updating snapshots.

when_to_use: Snapshot testing for Rust with inline and file snapshots
cargo-insta review workflow for snapshot approvals
Detect unexpected output changes in Rust serialization
Update snapshots across entire Rust workspace at once

pros: Idiomatic Rust snapshot testing with cargo-insta
Fast review TUI for accepting changes
Great with serde and redaction filters
cons: Inline snapshots can bloat source files
Extra CLI tool needed for best workflow
review.verdict: The de facto snapshot testing library for Rust, with a reviewer UX that actually respects your time.
review.best_for: Rust projects with complex serialization or parser outputs to pin down
review.not_for: Codebases where snapshots would simply hide missing assertions

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
